ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for the performance evaluation */,
  "score_threshold" REAL /* Score threshold for classification */,
  "measurements" INTEGER /* Total number of measurements */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* Confusion matrix as a nested array */,
  "true_positives" INTEGER /* Number of true positives */,
  "true_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of true negatives */,
  "false_positives" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "false_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "positives" INTEGER /* Total number of positive cases */,
  "negatives" INTEGER /* Total number of negative cases */,
  "measured_positives" INTEGER /* Number of measured positives */,
  "measured_negatives" INTEGER /* Number of measured negatives */,
  "correct_measurements" INTEGER /* Number of correct measurements */,
  "incorrect_measurements" INTEGER /* Number of incorrect measurements */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model */,
  "fallout" REAL /* Fallout of the model */,
  "miss_rate" REAL /* Miss rate of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the evaluation process in seconds */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "dataset_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset used */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the evaluation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model as a JSON object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions as a JSON object */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each performance record
Reference to the dataset used for the performance evaluation
Confusion matrix as a nested array
Duration of the evaluation process in seconds
Additional notes or comments about the evaluation
Timestamp when the model was created
Timestamp of the last update to the model
Hyperparameters of the model as a JSON object
Timestamp when the dataset was created
Timestamp of the last update to the dataset
Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin)
Timestamp when the user account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the user account
Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive)
User permissions as a JSON object
